title: Radical Rick and Bill Allen Signed Print by Damian Fulton — 57 of 100
source_title: Radical Rick and Bill Allen Signed Print by Damian Fulton 57 of 100
creator_display: Damian X. Fulton; signed by Damian Fulton and Bill Allen (inventory attribution)
alt: Framed print showing two BMX riders upside down near a finish banner, with signatures visible along the lower edge.
summary: Limited edition print illustrated by Radical Rick creator Damian Fulton celebrating two of the most recognizable icons of the 1980s BMX era. The artwork unites Radical Rick with Bill Allen, internationally known for portraying Cru Jones in the 1986 BMX film RAD. Hand-signed by both Fulton and Allen, this piece is numbered 57 of 100 and bridges BMX comic culture with the cinematic legacy of Helltrack.
provenance: Source recorded as Bill Allen in the Lititz BMX inventory.
claims: Signature attribution and edition number are preserved from the inventory record.
details: Connects Radical Rick comic culture with Bill Allen and the film RAD.
Inventory records signatures by Damian Fulton and Bill Allen.
rights_statement: Artifact images and Lititz BMX descriptive content remain associated with their respective creators, owners and Lititz BMX. Published for historical, educational and preservation access.
